name: Sofia Almeida
summary: Mid-level Flutter Developer with 4 years of experience in building cross-platform mobile applications. Proven ability to deliver high-quality, user-friendly apps from concept to deployment. Seeking to leverage expertise in mobile development to contribute to innovative projects.

experience.title: Flutter Developer
experience.description: Developed and maintained cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter. Collaborated with UI/UX designers to implement intuitive user interfaces. Integrated RESTful APIs and managed state effectively. Participated in code reviews and agile development processes.

experience.title: Junior Mobile Developer
experience.description: Assisted in the development of native Android and iOS applications. Gained foundational experience in mobile development lifecycles. Worked on bug fixing and feature enhancements for existing applications.

experience.title: Mobile Development Intern
experience.description: Supported the mobile development team with testing and documentation. Learned basic principles of mobile app development and version control systems.
